Table Name30%_Fair_value_decrease_contingent_encumbrance
Functional Name30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionContingent encumbrance refers to the additional assets which may need to be encumbered when the reporting institutions faces adverse developments triggered by an external event over which the reporting institution has no control (including a downgrade, decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets or a general loss of confidence). In these cases, the reporting institution will need to encumber additional assets as a consequence of already existing transactions. The additional amount of encumbered assets shall be net of the impact of the institution’s hedge transactions against the events described under the aforementioned stressed scenarios. (Annext 17 (Asset Encumbrance) 4. Part C)
Notes
Number Of Columns17
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7

kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level
4Accounting_standardPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework
5Collateralised_deposits_other_than_repurchase_agreements_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
6Collateralised_deposits_other_than_repurchase_agreements_with_central_banks_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals

15Repurchase_agreements_with_central_banks_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals

Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Collateralised_deposits_other_than_repurchase_agreements_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountCollateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
6Collateralised_deposits_other_than_repurchase_agreements_with_central_banks_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountCollateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
7Debt_securities_issued_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountDebt securities issued additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
8Debt_securities_issued_as_covered_bonds_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountDebt securities issued as covered bonds additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued as covered bonds by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
9Debt_securities_issued_as_securitisations_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountDebt securities issued as securitisations additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued as securitisations by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
10Deposits_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountDeposits additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are deposits by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
11Derivatives_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountDerivatives additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are derivatives by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
12Other_sources_of_encumbrance_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountOther sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Other sources of encumbrance by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
13Over-The-Counter_(OTC)_derivatives_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountOver-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
14Repurchase_agreements_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountRepurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount in  scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are repurchase agreements by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
15Repurchase_agreements_with_central_banks_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountRepurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount in  scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Repurchase agreements with central banks by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
16Selected_financial_liabilities_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountSelected financial liabilities additional encumbered carrying amount in  scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the selected financial liabilities encumbered assets by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
17Total_sources_of_encumbrance_additional_encumbered_carrying_amountTotal sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Table NameAsset_pool_(subject_to_a_Securitisation_and_other_credit_transfer)
Functional NameAsset pool (subject to a Securitisation and other credit transfer)
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Asset pool (subject to a Securitisation and other credit transfer) is a pool of assets that is subject to a Securitisation or other credit transfer. It may comprise Instruments or (parts of) Security positions that have been removed from the Reporting agents' balance sheet, e.g. in case of a Traditional securitisation using an SSPE, where the Reporting agents acts in the role of a Servicer.
Notes
Number Of Columns12
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4Accounting_standardPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Asset_pool_identifierPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Asset_class_according_to_CRR,_Article_129YString (1) DOMPrimary asset class of the cover pool (Input Layer)
7Asset_pool_typeYString (1) DOMAsset pool (subject to securitisation and other credit transfer) type
8Compliance_with_article_129_of_CRR_indicatorYString (1) DOMCompliance with article 129 CRR type (Input Layer)
9Treatment_of_securitised_/_transferred_assets_in_balance_sheetYString (1) DOMTreatment of transferred assets in balance sheet
10Asset-specific_valueDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
11Carrying_amountDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12Present_value_(swap)DECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Asset_pool_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
6Asset_class_according_to_CRR,_Article_129Asset class of the underlying asset pool subject to a covered bond according to CRR, Article 129 Exposure in the form of covered bonds.
7Asset_pool_typeA discriminator to distinguish between asset pools for securitisations, covered bond programs and other credit transfers.
8Compliance_with_article_129_of_CRR_indicatorCompliance with article 129 of CRR indicator indicates if the Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme) is in compliance with article 129 of Regulation (EU) No 575/213 (also known as CRR).
9Treatment_of_securitised_/_transferred_assets_in_balance_sheetSpecifies the treatment of the underlying assets in the balance sheet, e.g. entirely derecognised.
10Asset-specific_valueThe asset-specific value shall be the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value in accordance with IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an asset-specific interest rate curve.
11Carrying_amountThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
12Present_value_(swap)Present Value (swap) shall be the sum of claims to payment of principal and interest, as discounted by a foreign exchange-specific risk-free yield curve, determined in accordance with the relevant statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage for the Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme).
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order
Asset_pool_(subject_to_a_Securitisation_and_other_credit_transfer)_PKPKReference_dateASC
Reporting_agent_identifierASC
Accounting_consolidation_levelASC
Accounting_standardASC
Asset_pool_identifierASC
Constraints
TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelAccounting_consolidation_level
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
Accounting_standard
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
Asset_class_according_to_CRR,_Article_129
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
aExposures to or guaranteed by central governments, ESCB central banks, public sector entities, regional governments or local authorities in the Union
bExposures to or guaranteed by third country central governments, third-country central banks, multilateral development banks, international organisations that fullfill specific requirements
cExposures to institutions that fullfilll specific requirements
dLoans secured by (i) residential property or (ii) senior units issued by French Fonds Communs de Titrisation or equivalent securitisation entities governed by the laws of a Member State securitising residential property exposures
eResidential loans fully guaranteed by an eligible rpotection provider
fLoans secured by (i) commercial immovable property or (ii) senior units issued by French Fonds Communs de Titrisation or equivalent securitisation entities governed by the law of a Member State securitising commercial immovable property exposures.
gLoans secured by maritime liens on ships up to the difference between 60% of the value of the pledged ship and the value of any prior maritime liens
hOther exposures
Asset_pool_type
Values List
ValueDescription
1Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)
2Asset pool (subject to a credit transfer other than securitisation and covered bond programme)
3Asset pool (subject to a Securitisation)
Compliance_with_article_129_of_CRR_indicator
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1CRR Article 129 compliant Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)
2CRR Article 129 non-compliant Asset pool (subject to a Covered bond programme)
Treatment_of_securitised_/_transferred_assets_in_balance_sheet
Values List
ValueDescription
1Entirely recognised: Instrument entirely recognised, in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
2Recognised to the extent of the institution's continuing involvement: Instrument recognised to the extent of the institution's continuing involvement, in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
3Entirely derecognised: Instrument entirely derecognised, in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014

Table NameAsset_pool_Collateral_received_assignment
Functional NameAsset pool Collateral received assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Asset pool Debt security position assignment is the combination of an Asset pool and a Debt security position that indicates which (part of a) Debt security position is comprised in which Asset pool.

Table NameAsset_pool_Exchange_tradable_derivative_position_assignment
Functional NameAsset pool Exchange tradable derivative position assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAsset pool Exchange tradable derivative position is the combination of an Asset pool and an Exchange tradable derivative position that indicates which (part of an) Exchange tradable derivative position is comprised in which Asset pool.
Notes
Number Of Columns11
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7

NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Buyer_role_typePFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
2Buyer_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Seller_role_typePFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
4Seller_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
6Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore

8Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Buyer_role_typeThe buyer party role.
2Buyer_identifierThe party identifier of the involved buyer.
3Seller_role_typeThe seller role.
4Seller_identifierThe party identifier of the involved seller.
5Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
6Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
7Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
9Asset_pool_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
11Market_valueMarket value is the value in the market of the portion of the Exchange tradable derivative position that is used in the Asset pool as assigned in the Asset pool Exchange tradable derivative position assignment.

Table NameAsset_pool_Instrument_assignment
Functional NameAsset pool Deposit assignment derived data
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAsset pool Instrument assignment is the generalised combination of Asset pool and Instrument, that indicates which Instrument is part of which Asset pool.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Instrument_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6Asset_pool_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Asset_pool_Instrument_assignment_typeYString (1) DOMAsset pool Instrument assignment type
8Percentage_retainedDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
9Percentage_transferredDECIMALDOMReal numbers from 0 to 1 with 6 decimals
10Transferred_amountDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Instrument_identifierAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
2Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
3Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6Asset_pool_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each asset pool.
7Asset_pool_Instrument_assignment_typeAsset pool Instrument assignment type distinguishes the various combinations between types of asset pool and types of instruments according to their nature.
8Percentage_retainedThe percentage that has been retained.
9Percentage_transferredThe percentage that has been transferred.
10Transferred_amountHolding amount at nominal value

Order

kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Investor_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2Investor_role_typePFYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
3Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
4Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
5Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

9Available_for_encumbrance_indicatorYString (1) DOMAvailable for encumbrance indicator (Input layer)

11Encumbered_nominal_amountDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
12Encumbered_number_of_sharesDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals

Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Investor_identifierAn identifier that uniquely identifies a party.
2Investor_role_typeA discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.
3Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
4Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
6Security_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
9Available_for_encumbrance_indicatorAvailable for encumbrance indicator distinguishes the asset into being available for asset encumbrance and not being available for asset encumbrance.
10Encumbered_asset_indicatorEncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
11Encumbered_nominal_amountThe nominal amount that is encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.
12Encumbered_number_of_sharesThe number of shares that are encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.
13Fair_valueFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
14Nominal_amountThe nominal amount that is encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.
15Number_of_sharesThe number of shares that are encumbered according to ITS on Asset encumbrance, 1.7 Definition of encumbrance.

Table NameCash_on_hand
Functional NameCash on hand
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

Description‘Cash on hand’ shall include holdings of national and foreign banknotes and coins in circulation that are commonly used to make payments.

According to ESA 2010 this includes "Monetary gold", which is indicated via the currency "XAU". See ESA 2010 paragraph 5.65 - 5.68.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level
4Accounting_standardPYString (1) DOMAccounting framework
5CurrencyPYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain)
6Held_for_sale_indicatorPYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator
7Encumbered_asset_indicatorPYString (3) DOMEncumbered asset indicator
8Carrying_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5CurrencyThe currency code according to ISO4217.
6Held_for_sale_indicatorIndicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
7Encumbered_asset_indicatorEncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
8Carrying_amountThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

Table NameCollateral
Functional NameCollateral
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionCollateral is an asset that is pledged to mitigate the credit risk that may arise from a contract that is not an Instrument.
Notes
Number Of Columns21
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Collateral_identifierPYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Collateral_annex_Protection_arrangement_identifierFString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Security_identifierFString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8Collateral_typeYString (3) DOMCollateral type (Input Layer)
9CurrencyYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain) (Input Layer)
10Nomenclature_des_unités_territoriales_statistiques_(NUTS)_regionYString (5) DOMNUTS 3 codes (Input Layer)
11Non-reporting_member_state_Country_codeYString (2) DOMISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country (Input Layer)
12Planning_permission_for_development_indicatorYString (1) DOMPlanning permission indicator (Input Layer)
13Real_estate_collateral_location_typeYString (2) DOMReal estate collateral location type (Input Layer)
14Registered_physical_collateral_indicatorYString (2) DOMRegistered collateral indicator (Input Layer)
15Type_of_protection_valuation_approach_for_fair_valueYString (1) DOMType of protection valuation approach (Input Layer)
16Under_construction_or_development_indicatorYString (1) DOMUnder construction or development indicator (Input Layer)
17Fair_value_amount_of_the_collateralStringDOMMonetary
18Long-term_sustainable_value_amount_of_the_collateralStringDOMMonetary
19Market_value_amount_of_the_collateralDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
20Notional_amountDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
21Postal_codeString (255) DOMString up to 255 characters - latin extended
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Collateral_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
6Collateral_annex_Protection_arrangement_identifierThe protection arrangement of the collateral annex.
7Security_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each security.
9CurrencyThe currency code according to ISO4217.
10Nomenclature_des_unités_territoriales_statistiques_(NUTS)_regionThe region inside a country according to NUTS.
11Non-reporting_member_state_Country_codeThe country code of the non-reporting member state.
12Planning_permission_for_development_indicatorPlanning permission for development indicator distinguishes Land excluding agriculture based on whether planning permission for development applies or not.
13Real_estate_collateral_location_typeReal estate collateral location type is a discriminator to distinguish between real estate collateral located in a member state or not in a member state.
15Type_of_protection_valuation_approach_for_fair_valueType of protection valuation approach.
16Under_construction_or_development_indicatorUnder construction or development indicator indicates whether the property is under construction or development.

Finrep Annex V. Part 2.350, 352(a). With regard to collateral in the form of immovable property (a) immovable property that is under construction or development.
17Fair_value_amount_of_the_collateralFair value of the collateral as defined in IFRS 13.9.
18Long-term_sustainable_value_amount_of_the_collateralLong-term sustainable value amount of the collateral is the  ‘mortgage lending value’ of immovable property as defined in Article 4(1)(74) of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013. To be used if the protection is immovable property when the 'mortgage lending value' is reported in the data attribute 'Protection value'.
19Market_value_amount_of_the_collateralThe market value of collateral.
20Notional_amountThe notional amount on a financial instrument is the nominal or face amount that is used to calculate payments made on that instrument.
21Postal_codeEntity's postal code.

Type_of_protection_valuation_approach_for_fair_value
Values List
ValueDescription
1Counterparty estimation: Valuation method whereby the valuation is carried out by the provider of the protection. 
2Creditor valuation: Valuation method whereby the valuation is carried out by the creditor: valuation undertaken by an external or staff appraiser who possesses the necessary qualifications, ability and experience to execute a valuation and who is not independent from the credit decision process. 
3Mark-to-market: Valuation method whereby the protection value is based on unadjusted quoted prices for identical assets and liabilities in an active market. 
5Third-party valuation: Valuation method in which the valuation is provided by an appraiser who is independent from the credit decision process. 
Under_construction_or_development_indicator
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Under construction or development
2Not under construction or development

Table NameCollateral_given_instrument_Debt_security_issued_assignment
Functional NameCollateral given instrument Debt security issued assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionCollateral given instrument Debt security issued assignment is the combination of Collateral given instrument and Debt security issued that indicates which Debt security issued is protected by which Collateral given instrument.
Notes
Number Of Columns9
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Instrument_role_typePYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Instrument_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Debt_security_issued_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8Accounting_classificationPFYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
9Protection_allocated_valueYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Instrument_role_typeA discriminator to distinguish between different roles an instrument may act in. Examples are financial asset instrument, financial liability instrument.
6Instrument_identifierAn identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.
7Debt_security_issued_identifierThe security identifier of the involved debt security.
8Accounting_classificationAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
9Protection_allocated_valueThe maximum amount of the protection value that can be considered as credit protection for the instrument. The amount of the existing third parties or observed agent priority claims against the protection must be excluded in the protection allocated value. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

Instrument_identifierASC

TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelAccounting_consolidation_level
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
Accounting_standard
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
Accounting_classification
Values List
ValueDescription
21IFRS: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost in accordance with IFRS
23IFRS: Financial liabilities held for trading: Financial liabilities held for trading in accordance with IFRS
25IFRS: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS
31nGAAP: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
33nGAAP: Trading financial liabilities: Trading financial liabilities in accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
35nGAAP: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with nationa GAAP based on BAD
852nGAAP: Accounting portfolios for trading financial liabilities. Cost based method or LOCOM

1Reference_datePFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)

Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Collateral_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
6Collateral_role_typeCollateral role type distiguishes the Collateral role according to the role the Collateral acts in.
7Available_for_encumbrance_indicatorAvailable for encumbrance indicator distinguishes the asset into being available for asset encumbrance and not being available for asset encumbrance.
8Collateral_reuse_indicatorCollateral reuse indicator distinguishes Collateral into those that have been used once, and those that have been reused by the financial organisation.
9Encumbered_asset_indicatorEncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
11Collateral_received_reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
12Date_of_original_protection_valueThe date of the protection’s original value, i.e. the date on which the latest appraisal or valuation of the protection was carried out prior to its initial receipt as a credit protection.
13Original_protection_valueThe protection’s fair value at the date when it was originally received as a credit protection.
14Protection_value_dateProtection value date is the date on which the latest appraisal or valuation of the protection was carried out prior to the reporting reference date.

Table NameCovered_bond_programme_relevant_regime_excess
Functional NameCovered bond programme relevant regime excess
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA covered bond programme is a form of credit transfer that involves the sale of a package of loans to a another financial institution for resale.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Covered_bond_programme_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Excess_coverage_asset-specific_valueDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
7Excess_coverage_nominal_amountDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8Excess_coverage_present_value(swap)_/_market_valueDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Covered_bond_programme_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each covered bond program.
6Excess_coverage_asset-specific_valueExcess coverage asset-specific value is the aggregate of the Excess coverage asset-specific value of the assets in the cover pool according to the relevant statutory covered bond regime.

The asset-specific value is the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value according to IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an assetspecific interest rate curve.

7Excess_coverage_nominal_amountExcess coverage nominal amount is the amount in excess of the minimum coverage required with regards to the nominal amount according to the relevant statutory covered bond regime for the Covered bond programme.

Nominal amount is the sum of claims to payment of principal, determined in accordance with the respective statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage. 
8Excess_coverage_present_value(swap)_/_market_valueExcess coverage present value(swap) / market value is the aggregate of the present value (swap) of the cover pool and the market value of the derived assets in the cover pool according to the relevant statutory covered bond regime.

The asset-specific value is the economic value of the cover pool assets, as may be described by a fair value according to IFRS 13, a market value observable from executed transactions in liquid markets, or a present value that would discount future cash flows of an asset by an assetspecific interest rate curve.

Table NameCredit_facility
Functional NameCredit facility with interest rate
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Credit facility is a commitment (revocable or irrevocable) made by a financial institution to make an amount of money available to the customer (or a plurality of customers), or to assume for it an obligation to a third party. The commitment is based on an agreement between the financial institution and the customer, which originates from a request of the customer or an acceptance by the customer of a proposal from the financial institution.

Please note that the Credit facility is always off-balance sheet given.
Notes
Number Of Columns39
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Credit_facility_identifierPYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Financial_contract_identifierFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Accounting_classificationYString (3) DOMAccounting classification applicable to off-balance sheet items
8Accumulated_changes_in_fair_valueYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9Accumulated_changes_in_fair_value_due_to_credit_riskYDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10Assessment_approach_for_credit_quality_statusYString (1) DOMAssessment approach for credit quality status - full domain
11Credit_facility_Inception_dateYDateDOMAll possible dates
12Credit_risk_induced_accumulated_negative_value_adjustmentsYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
13CurrencyYString (3) DOMSubdomain for domain ISO-4217 Currency Codes (ISO4217 Domain)
14Date_of_performing_statusYDateDOMAll possible dates
15Encumbered_asset_indicatorYString (3) DOMEncumbered asset indicator
16Fair_valueYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
17Forbearance_measure_typeYString (2) DOMForbearance measure type
18Freezing_period_in_daysYIntegerDOMNon-negative integers
19General_allowances_for_bank_risk_affecting_carrying_amount_(nGAAP)YDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
20General_allowances_for_credit_risk_affecting_carrying_amount_(nGAAP)YDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
21Impairment_statusYString (3) DOMImpairment status
22Legal_final_maturity_dateYDateDOMAll possible dates
23Market_risk_induced_accumulated_negative_value_adjustmentsYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
24Nominal_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
25Non-performing_prior_to_forbearance_indicatorYString (1) DOMNon-performing prior to forbearance indicator
26Performing_forborne_exposure_under_probation_reclassified_from_non-performing_indicatorYString (1) DOMNon-performing prior to forbearance indicator
27Performing_statusYString (2) DOMPerforming status
28Performing_status_reasonYString (1) DOMPerforming status reason
29Provisions_associated_with_off-balance_sheet_exposuresYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
30Renegotiated_credit_facility_typeYStringDOMRenegotiated credit facility type (Input Layer)
31Retail_exposure_according_to_CRR,_Article_123_(b)_indicatorYString (1) DOMRetail exposure accordign to CRR, Article 123 (b) indicator
32Revocable_indicatorYString (1) DOMRevocable indicator
33Settlement_dateYDateDOMAll possible dates
34Type_of_credit_facilityYString (2) DOMType of credit facility
35Derived_default_statusYStringDOMDerived default status (Input Layer)
36Time_past_due_bandYStringDOMTime past due band (Input Layer)
37Date_of_forbearance_statusDateDOMAll possible dates
38Date_of_renegotiation_statusDateDOMAll possible dates
39Interest_rateDECIMAL (6)DOMReal numbers positive or negative with 6 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Credit_facility_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
6Financial_contract_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each financial contract.
7Accounting_classificationAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
8Accumulated_changes_in_fair_valueAmount of gains and losses from re-measurement of the asset accumulated from the initial recognition to the reference date.
9Accumulated_changes_in_fair_value_due_to_credit_riskAccumulated changes in fair value due to credit risk in accordance with Part 2.46 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
10Assessment_approach_for_credit_quality_statusApproach chosen by the institution to apply the definitions of default, according to Article 178 of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, and of non-performing, according to Regulation (EU) No 680/2014, Annex V, Part 2.154.
11Credit_facility_Inception_dateThe date on which the current contractual relationship originated, i.e. the date on which the contract agreement became binding for all parties.
12Credit_risk_induced_accumulated_negative_value_adjustmentsAccumulated negative value adjustments. Market risk induced
13CurrencyThe currency code according to ISO4217.
14Date_of_performing_statusThe date on which the performing status is considered to have been established or changed.
15Encumbered_asset_indicatorEncumbered asset indicator signals whether the asset is encumbered or not.
16Fair_valueFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
17Forbearance_measure_typeA discriminator to distinguish between refinanced debt, instruments with modified interest rate below market value and other modified terms.
18Freezing_period_in_daysThe number of days (if any) for which the freezing period of the asset has been applied, in accordance with EBA guidelines 2016/07 paragraph 18.
19General_allowances_for_bank_risk_affecting_carrying_amount_(nGAAP)General allowances for bank risk affecting carrying amount (nGAAP)
20General_allowances_for_credit_risk_affecting_carrying_amount_(nGAAP)General allowances for credit risk affecting carrying amount (nGAAP)
21Impairment_statusType of impairment recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP.
22Legal_final_maturity_dateThe contractual maturity date of the asset or liability, taking into account any agreements amending initial contracts.
23Market_risk_induced_accumulated_negative_value_adjustmentsAccumulated negative value adjustments. Market risk induced
24Nominal_amountHolding amount at nominal value
25Non-performing_prior_to_forbearance_indicatorAn indicator specifying if an exposure was non-performing prior to the extension of forbearance measures.
26Performing_forborne_exposure_under_probation_reclassified_from_non-performing_indicatorAn indicator specifying if an asset is classified as Non-performing forborne exposure under probation reclassified from non-performing or not according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.260.
27Performing_statusPerforming status in accordance with Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
28Performing_status_reasonThe reason for the choice of Performing status
29Provisions_associated_with_off-balance_sheet_exposuresThe amount of provisions for off-balance sheet amounts.
31Retail_exposure_according_to_CRR,_Article_123_(b)_indicatorAn indicator specifying if a credit facility is considered a retail exposure according to Regulation (EU) 575/2013, Article 178, subparagraph following (b).
32Revocable_indicatorRevocable indicator is an indicator specifying if the Credit facility is revocable or not
33Settlement_dateThe date on which the conditions specified in the contract are or can be executed for the first time, i.e. the date on which financial instruments are initially exchanged or created.
34Type_of_credit_facilityClassification of the credit facility.
36Time_past_due_bandA Time past due band distinguishes Credit facility risk data into time brackets according to how much time passed between the date on which the payment was due and the reference date. 
37Date_of_forbearance_statusThe date on which forbearance measure have been applied.
38Date_of_renegotiation_statusThe date on which the renegotiation status is considered to have been established or changed.
39Interest_rateAnnualised agreed rate or narrowly defined interest rate in accordance with Regulation (EU) No 1072/2013 of the European Central Bank (ECB/2013/34).
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

Reporting_agent_identifierASC

Accounting_standardASC
Credit_facility_identifierASC

TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelAccounting_consolidation_level
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
Accounting_standard
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
Accounting_classification
Values List
ValueDescription
90Under IFRS 9 impairment: Off balance sheet accounting classification: under IFRS 9 impairment
911Measured under IAS 37: Off balance sheet accounting classification: measured under IAS 37
912Measured under IFRS 4: Off balance sheet accounting classification: measured under IFRS 4
92Measured at fair value through profit or loss: Off balance sheet accounting classification: IFRS 9 fair valued commitments and financial guarantees
93Under nGAAP: Off balance sheet accounting classification: measured under nGAAP based on BAD

Encumbered_asset_indicator
Values List
ValueDescription
1Not encumbered asset
100Encumbered asset
Forbearance_measure_type
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Grace period/payment moratorium
10Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate below market conditions
11Forborne: instruments with modified interest rate not below market conditions
3Extension of maturity/term
4Rescheduled payments
5Debt forgiveness
6Debt asset swaps
7Other forbearance measures
8Forborne: Refinanced debt
9Forborne: instruments with other modified terms and conditions
Impairment_status
Values List
ValueDescription
211General allowances for credit risk (GAAP)
212General allowances for banking risk (GAAP)
23Stage 1 (IFRS): To be used if the instrument is not impaired and a loss allowance at an amount equal to 12-month expected credit losses is raised against the instrument under IFRS. Only for instruments subject to impairment under IFRS 9.
24Stage 2 (IFRS): To be used if the instrument is not impaired and a loss allowance at an amount equal to lifetime expected credit losses is raised against the instrument under IFRS. Only for instruments subject to impairment under IFRS 9.
25Stage 3 (IFRS): To be used if the instrument is impaired and a loss allowance at an amount equal to lifetime expected credit losses is raised against the instrument under IFRS. Only for instruments subject to impairment under IFRS 9.
26Specific allowances (GAAP): To be used if the instrument is subject to impairment in accordance with an applied accounting standard other than IFRS 9 and specific loss allowances are raised, irrespective of whether these allowances are individually or collectively assessed (impaired
27Purchased or originated credit-impaired instruments (POCI) (IFRS)

ValueDescription

2Not non-performing prior to forbearance

11Performing

Table NameCredit_facility_Collateral_received_assignment
Functional NameCredit facility Collateral received assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Credit facility Collateral assignment is the combination of a Credit facility and a Collateral that indicates which Credit facility is assigned to which Collateral.
Notes
Number Of Columns7
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Credit_facility_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2Reference_datePFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
5Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6Collateral_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Collateral_role_typePFYString (1) DOMCollateral role type (Input layer)
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Credit_facility_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
2Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
3Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6Collateral_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.
7Collateral_role_typeCollateral role type distiguishes the Collateral role according to the role the Collateral acts in.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

Table NameCredit_facility_Collateral_received_instrument_assignment
Functional NameCredit facility Collateral received instrument assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Credit facility Collateral received instrument assignment is the combination of a Credit facility and a Collateral received instrument that indicates which Credit facility is protected by which Collateral received instrument.
Notes
Number Of Columns8
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Credit_facility_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
2Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
5Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6Instrument_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Instrument_role_typePYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8Protection_allocated_valueYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Credit_facility_identifierAn identifier to uniquely identify each credit facility.
2Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
3Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
4Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
6Instrument_identifierThe instrument identifier of the involved collateral received instrument.
7Instrument_role_typeThe collateral received instrument role.
8Protection_allocated_valueThe maximum amount of the protection value that can be considered as credit protection for the instrument. The amount of the existing third parties or observed agent priority claims against the protection must be excluded in the protection allocated value. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
Indexes

Order

Table NameCredit_risk_mitigation_assignment
Functional NameCredit risk mitigation assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA credit risk mitigation membership is the combination of a Credit risk mitigation arrangement and a Protection item that indicates which Protection item is comprised in which Credit risk mitigation arrangement. 
Please note that the many-to-many relationship (established via this entity) is only applicable to Registered protection (and saving accounts where there exists a physical document (i.e. Sparbuch)), for all other Protection items the relationship between the Credit risk mitigation arrangement and the Protection item is of type one-to-many.
Notes
Number Of Columns6
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear

Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7

kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation

2Reference_datePFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
4Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYStringDOMSecurity position Balance sheet recognised type (Input Layer)
5Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
6Collateral_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore

NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes

1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS

Table NameDebt_security_issued_(by_the_reporting_agent)
Functional NameDebt security issued (by the reporting agent)
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionA Debt security issued (by the Reporting agent) is the combination of the  Debt security where the Reporting agent is the Debtor and the accounting classification that represents the financial liability side of the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent).

Please note: 
- The overall information about the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is in the entity type Debt security.
- The asset side of the bought back and/or retained part of the Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is in the entity type Long debt security position.
Notes
Number Of Columns24
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Debt_security_issued_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Accounting_classificationPYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
7Asset_encumbrance_source_indicatorYString (1) DOMAsset encumbrance source indicator
8Carrying_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9Debt_security_issued_prudential_portfolio_typeYString (2) DOMDebt Security Issued prudential portfolio type (Input Layer)
10Debt_security_issued_typeYString (2) DOMDebt security issued type
11Fair_value_hierarchyYString (1) DOMFair value hierarchy (Input Layer)
12Fair_value_option_designationYString (1) DOMFair value option designation (Input layer)
13Held_for_sale_indicatorYString (1) DOMHeld for sale indicator
14Nominal_amountYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
15Non-performing_prior_to_forbearance_indicatorYString (1) DOMNon-performing prior to forbearance indicator
16Present_value_(swap)YDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
17Type_of_productYString (3) DOMType of product for debt securities issued
18Liability_encumbrance_residual_maturity_bandYStringDOMResidual maturity band (Input Layer)
19Accumulated_changes_in_fair_valueDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
20Accumulated_changes_in_fair_value_due_to_(own)_credit_riskDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
21Fair_valueDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
22Fair_value_changeDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
23Haircuts_for_trading_position_valued_at_fair_valueDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
24Start_date_of_the_periodDateDOMAll possible dates
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Debt_security_issued_identifierThe security identifier of the involved debt security.
6Accounting_classificationAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
7Asset_encumbrance_source_indicatorAsset encumbrance source indicator signals whether the liabity or off-balance sheet item is a source of encumbrance for an asset or not.
8Carrying_amountThe carrying amount in accordance with Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

"the carrying amount" means the amount to be reported in the balance sheet. 
The carrying amount of financial instruments shall include accrued interest. Under the relevant national GAAP based on BAD, the carrying amount of derivatives either shall be the carrying amount under national GAAP including accruals, premium values and provisions if applicable, or it shall be equal to zero where derivatives are not recognised on-balance sheet.
9Debt_security_issued_prudential_portfolio_typeDebt security issued prudential portfolio type distinguishes Debt security issued (by the reporting agent) according to where in the prudential portfolio the liability is recorded, banking or trading book.
11Fair_value_hierarchyLevel of fair value of a financial instruments according to the hierarchy defined in IFRS 13. Applicable to national GAAP based on BAD only if the allocation of instruments is measured at fair value according to different levels.
13Held_for_sale_indicatorHeld for sale  indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.
14Nominal_amountHolding amount at nominal value
15Non-performing_prior_to_forbearance_indicatorNon-performing prior to forbearance specifies if an asset that is a debt security issued (by the reporting agent) is classified as non-performing prior to forbearance according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.263.
16Present_value_(swap)Present Value (swap) shall be the sum of claims to payment of principal and interest, as discounted by a foreign exchange-specific risk-free yield curve, determined in accordance with the relevant statutory covered bond regime's rules that apply for determining sufficient coverage for the Debt security (issued by the reporting agent).
17Type_of_productType of product
19Accumulated_changes_in_fair_valueAmount of gains and losses from re-measurement of the asset accumulated from the initial recognition to the reference date.
20Accumulated_changes_in_fair_value_due_to_(own)_credit_riskAccumulated changes in fair value due to credit risk in accordance with Part 2.46 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.
21Fair_valueFair value as defined in IFRS 13.9.
22Fair_value_changeFair value changes in the period and before taxes.
23Haircuts_for_trading_position_valued_at_fair_valueHaircut for trading position valued at fair value. 
According to Annex V (5.29):
Where applicable under national GAAP based on BAD, ‘Haircuts for trading positions valued at fair value’ shall be reported. The haircuts decrease the value of trading assets and increase the value of trading liabilities.
24Start_date_of_the_periodThe start date of the period.
Indexes
Index NameStateFunctionalSpatialExpressionColumn NameSort
Order

TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails

Values List
ValueDescription

1Solo consolidation level

Accounting_standard
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
Accounting_classification
Values List
ValueDescription
21IFRS: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost in accordance with IFRS
23IFRS: Financial liabilities held for trading: Financial liabilities held for trading in accordance with IFRS
25IFRS: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS
31nGAAP: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method: Non-trading non-derivative financial liabilities measured at a cost-based method accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
33nGAAP: Trading financial liabilities: Trading financial liabilities in accordance with national GAAP based on BAD
35nGAAP: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with nationa GAAP based on BAD
852nGAAP: Accounting portfolios for trading financial liabilities. Cost based method or LOCOM
Asset_encumbrance_source_indicator
Values List
ValueDescription
1Asset encumbrance source
2Not an asset encumbrance source
Debt_security_issued_prudential_portfolio_type
Values List
ValueDescription
22Issued debt security in the banking book
23Issued debt security in the trading book International Financial Reporting Standard (IFRS)
24Issued debt security in the trading book national general accepted accounting principles (nGAAP)
Debt_security_issued_type
Values List
ValueDescription
15Fair-valued debt security issued
16Non-fair-valued debt security issued
Fair_value_hierarchy
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Level 1: Level 1 inputs used for the measurement of fair value. Level 1 inputs are quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities that the entity can access at the measurement date
2Level 2: Level 2 inputs used for the measurment of fair value. Level 2 inputs are inputs other than quoted prices included within Level 1 that are observable for the asset or liability, either directly or indirectly
3Level 3: Level 3 inputs used for the measurment of fair value. Level 3 inputs are unobservable inputs for the asset or liability
Fair_value_option_designation
Values List
ValueDescription
1Accounting mismatch
2Management on a fair value basis
3Hybrid contract
5Management of credit risk. Upon designation
6"Management of credit risk. After the designation
Held_for_sale_indicator
Values List
ValueDescription
1Held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is held for sale
2Not held for sale: The member indicates that the instrument is not held for sale
Non-performing_prior_to_forbearance_indicator
Values List
ValueDescription
1Non-performing prior to forbearance
2Not non-performing prior to forbearance
Type_of_product
Values List
ValueDescription
610Certificates of deposits
620Asset-backed securities
630Covered bonds
640Hybrid contracts
650Other debt securities issued
651Other debt securities issued - convertible compound financial instruments
652Other debt securities issued - non-convertible

Values List
ValueDescription
0Not Applicable
12(3m,6m]
16(6m, 12m]
21(1y, 2y]
28(2y, 3y]

31(3y, 5y]
36(5y, 10y]
40Over 10 years
64[0d, 1d]
81> 7 days, <= 14 days
82> 2 weeks, <= 1 month
9(1m, 3m]
999Open Maturity

Table NameDebt_security_issued_(by_the_reporting_agent)_Protection_arrangement_given_assignment
Functional NameDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) Protection arrangement given assignment
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionDebt security issued (by the reporting agent) Protection arrangement assignment is the combination of Debt security issued and Protection arrangement stating which Debt security issued is protected by which Protection arrangement.
Notes
Number Of Columns10
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
2Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
3Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
4Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
5Debt_security_issued_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Accounting_classificationPFYString (2) DOMAccounting classification for liabilities
7Protection_arrangement_identifierPFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
8Protection_arrangement_role_typePFYString (120) DOMString up to 120 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
9Allocated_unused_collateral_valueYDECIMALDOMReal numbers with 2 decimals
10Protection_allocated_valueYDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
2Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
3Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
5Debt_security_issued_identifierThe security identifier of the involved debt security.
6Accounting_classificationAccounting portfolio where the asset or liability is recorded in accordance with the accounting standard – IFRS or national GAAP –under Regulation (EU) 2015/534 (ECB/2015/13) applied by the observed agent's legal entity.
7Protection_arrangement_identifierAn identifier to univocally identify each protection arragement.
8Protection_arrangement_role_typeProtection arrangement role type distinguishes the Protection arrangement role according to their nature.
9Allocated_unused_collateral_valueAllocated unused collateral value is an amount that expresses the protection value that is not used for risk mitigation and, for FINREP reporting purposes is allocated to a specific Loan and advance, which is the Long non-negotiable security position.
10Protection_allocated_valueProtection allocated value is the maximum amount of the protection value, via the Protection arrangement, that can be considered as credit protection for the Long security position. For protections that is eligible under Regulation (EU) No 575/2013, this value should be reported in accordance with Part 2 of Annex V to Implementing Regulation (EU) No 680/2014.

MV Query

TypeColumn / Constraint NameDetails
Column LevelAccounting_consolidation_level
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1Solo consolidation level
2Group consolidation level
Accounting_standard
Values List
ValueDescription
0Not applicable
1National GAAP not consistent with IFRS
2IFRS
3National GAAP consistent with IFRS
Accounting_classification
Values List
ValueDescription
21IFRS: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost: Financial liabilities measured at amortised cost in accordance with IFRS
23IFRS: Financial liabilities held for trading: Financial liabilities held for trading in accordance with IFRS
25IFRS: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss: Financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS

Type_of_hedge
Values List
ValueDescription
1Fair value hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (a)
11Hedges other than cash flow hedge and hedge of net investment in a foreign operation: Economic hedge
12Economic hedge. With use of fair value option
13Economic hedge. Other
2Cash flow hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (b)
3Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation: Hedging relationship as defined in IFRS 9.6.5.2 (c)
4Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
5Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk: Hedging relationship as defined in IAS39.AG 114-132
6Cost-price hedge: Hedging relationship as defined in Reg. 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.114. This hedging relationship is applicable only under nGAAP based on BAD
7Other than Fair value hedge, Cash flow hedge, Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation, Portfolio fair value hedges of interest rate risk, Portfolio cash flow hedges of interest rate risk, Cost-price hedge: Other applicable hedging relationship for nGAAP based on BAD reporters

Table NameEntity_role
Functional NameLessee derived data
Abbreviation
Classification Type Name
Object Type Name
MV Prebuilt
MV Query

DescriptionAn Entity role is a role a Party (or a subtype of Party) may act in.
Notes
Number Of Columns11
Number Of Rows Min.0
Number Of Rows Max.9999999
Expected Number Of Rows0
Expected Growth0
Growth IntervalYear
Used In Diagrams
Diagram Name
Enriched Input Layer with Full Names 6.7
Columns
NoColumn NamePKFKMData TypeDT 
kind		Domain NameFormula
(Default Value)		SecurityAbbreviation
1Accounting_consolidation_levelPFYString (1) DOMAccounting consolidation level (Input layer)
2Reference_datePFYDateDOMAll possible dates
3Accounting_standardPFYString (1) DOMAccounting framework (Input layer)
4Entity_role_typePYString (2) DOMParty role type (Input Layer)
5Party_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
6Reporting_agent_identifierPFYString (60) DOMString up to 60 characters limited to letters (capital and low cases), numbers, dash and underscore
7Aggregated_commitment_amount_for_Anacredit_reportingDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
8EquityDECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
9Profit_(loss)DECIMAL (2)DOMPositive and negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
10Share_capitalDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
11Total_assetsDECIMALDOMNon-negative monetary amounts with 2 decimals
Columns Comments
NoColumn NameDescriptionNotes
1Accounting_consolidation_levelAccounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.
2Reference_dateThe date the data refers to.
4Entity_role_typeThe organisation role.
5Party_identifierThe party identifier of the involved organisation.
6Reporting_agent_identifierIdentifier of the reporting agent.
8EquityEquity at the last financial statement (see Finrep annex V 296.f)
9Profit_(loss)Profit or loss.
10Share_capitalShare capital according to Regulation (EU) 680/2014, Annex V, part 2.296(e): "‘Share capital of investee’ means the total amount of capital issued by the investee as at the reference date;"
11Total_assetsTotal assets.
